---
id: event-types-create
title: "Create a new event type"
description: "Defines a new event type for an application. Event types help categorize and structure emitted events, making them easier to manage and subscribe to."
sidebar_label: "Create a new event type"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api:

info_path: api/hook-0-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create a new event type"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/event_types/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Defines a new event type for an application. Event types help categorize and structure emitted events, making them easier to manage and subscribe to.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

  parameters={undefined}

  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"application_id":{"type":"string","format":"uuid"},"resource_type":{"type":"string"},"service":{"type":"string"},"verb":{"type":"string"}},"required":["application_id","resource_type","service","verb"],"title":"EventTypePost"}}},"required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"201":{"description":"Created","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"event_type_name":{"type":"string"},"resource_type_name":{"type":"string"},"service_name":{"type":"string"},"verb_name":{"type":"string"}},"required":["event_type_name","resource_type_name","service_name","verb_name"],"title":"EventType"}}}},"400":{"description":"Bad Request"},"403":{"description":"Forbidden"},"404":{"description":"Not Found"},"409":{"description":"Conflict"},"500":{"description":"Internal Server Error"}}}
>
